name: Hardware Product Launch
description: End-to-end hardware product launch covering BOM, PCB design, power/RF, quality/field trials, regulatory compliance, and factory readiness.

tasks.name: Define product requirements document (PRD)
tasks.description: Capture all functional, performance, and environmental requirements
tasks.risk_if_missed: Scope creep and misaligned engineering effort

tasks.name: BOM cost analysis and vendor sourcing
tasks.description: Identify components, negotiate pricing, establish supply chain

tasks.name: Schematic design review
tasks.description: Peer review of circuit schematics for correctness and manufacturability
tasks.dependencies: BOM cost analysis and vendor sourcing

tasks.name: PCB layout and routing
tasks.description: Physical board layout including signal integrity and thermal considerations

tasks.name: Power supply design and validation
tasks.description: Design power regulation circuits and validate efficiency/thermals

tasks.name: RF antenna design and matching
tasks.description: Design and tune antenna for target frequency bands

tasks.name: Prototype assembly and bring-up
tasks.description: Assemble first prototypes and verify basic functionality

tasks.name: Environmental stress testing (temp, humidity, vibration)
tasks.description: Subject units to environmental chambers per IEC standards

tasks.name: EMC pre-compliance testing
tasks.description: Conduct radiated/conducted emissions testing in-house

tasks.name: Regulatory submission (FCC/CE/ICASA)
tasks.description: Prepare and submit documentation to regulatory bodies

tasks.name: Field trial deployment (beta sites)
tasks.description: Install units at beta customer sites and monitor performance

tasks.name: Factory line setup and validation
tasks.description: Configure assembly line, jigs, test fixtures, and quality gates

tasks.name: First article inspection (FAI)
tasks.description: Inspect first production units against design specifications

tasks.name: Mass production ramp-up plan
tasks.description: Plan volume ramp, yield targets, and supply chain readiness

tasks.name: End-of-line test procedure development
tasks.description: Create automated test scripts for production line testing
tasks.risk_if_missed: Escaping defects and high return rates

name: Software Platform Delivery
description: Full-stack software platform delivery covering protocol definition, MQTT ingestion, data lake, applications/frontend, testing, and release management.

tasks.name: Define communication protocol specification
tasks.description: Document message formats, topics, QoS levels, and payload schemas

tasks.name: MQTT broker cluster setup
tasks.description: Deploy and configure MQTT broker with HA, auth, and ACLs
tasks.risk_if_missed: Single point of failure for telemetry

tasks.name: Telemetry ingestion pipeline
tasks.description: Build message consumers that validate, transform, and route telemetry

tasks.name: Data lake schema design
tasks.description: Design partitioning, retention policies, and query patterns

tasks.name: Payload decoder library
tasks.description: Implement decoders for all device protocol versions

tasks.name: REST API design and implementation
tasks.description: Build RESTful endpoints for device management and data access

tasks.name: Frontend dashboard development
tasks.description: Build real-time monitoring dashboard with maps, charts, alerts

tasks.name: User authentication and RBAC
tasks.description: Implement SSO, multi-tenancy, and role-based access control

tasks.name: Integration test suite
tasks.description: End-to-end tests covering device-to-dashboard data flow

tasks.name: Load and stress testing
tasks.description: Simulate 10K+ concurrent devices to validate scalability

tasks.name: CI/CD pipeline configuration
tasks.description: Automate build, test, and deployment workflows

tasks.name: Release notes and changelog
tasks.description: Document features, fixes, and known issues for each release

name: Infrastructure & Cloud Operations
description: Cloud infrastructure setup covering environment architecture, Kubernetes orchestration, data platforms, and security hardening.

tasks.name: Cloud architecture design document
tasks.description: Design multi-region architecture with DR, networking, and cost model

tasks.name: VPC and network topology setup
tasks.description: Configure VPCs, subnets, peering, VPN, and firewall rules

tasks.name: Kubernetes cluster provisioning
tasks.description: Deploy managed K8s clusters with node pools, autoscaling, and RBAC

tasks.name: Service mesh and ingress configuration
tasks.description: Configure Istio/Envoy service mesh with mTLS and traffic management

tasks.name: Observability stack (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki)
tasks.description: Deploy monitoring, alerting, logging, and distributed tracing

tasks.name: Database cluster deployment
tasks.description: Deploy and configure PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB with replication and backups

tasks.name: Object storage and CDN setup
tasks.description: Configure S3-compatible storage with lifecycle policies and CDN distribution

tasks.name: IAM and secrets management
tasks.description: Configure identity federation, service accounts, and vault secrets

tasks.name: Vulnerability scanning pipeline
tasks.description: Integrate container and dependency scanning into CI/CD

tasks.name: Disaster recovery runbook and drill
tasks.description: Document and test failover procedures for all critical systems

name: Technical Services & Installations
description: Installer enablement, tools, ECC/recovery, training programs, and field rollout coordination.

tasks.name: Installer certification program design
tasks.description: Define competency framework, assessment criteria, and certification levels

tasks.name: Installation SOP documentation
tasks.description: Write step-by-step standard operating procedures with photos and diagrams

tasks.name: Mobile app for field technicians

tasks.name: Fleet diagnostics dashboard
tasks.description: Build real-time view of device health, connectivity, and alerts for support

tasks.name: ECC escalation workflow design
tasks.description: Define tiers, SLAs, escalation paths, and resolution templates
tasks.risk_if_missed: Slow issue resolution and customer churn

tasks.name: Recovery and replacement process
tasks.description: Design logistics for device recovery, refurbishment, and replacement

tasks.name: Train-the-trainer program
tasks.description: Develop master trainer curriculum and train regional leads

tasks.name: E-learning module creation
tasks.description: Create online training modules with quizzes and practical assessments

tasks.name: Pilot region selection and planning
tasks.description: Select initial deployment region based on readiness and strategic value

tasks.name: Rollout schedule and logistics plan
tasks.description: Plan phased deployment schedule, inventory, and technician allocation

tasks.name: Post-installation quality audit
tasks.description: Random audits of completed installations to verify SOP compliance

name: Marketing Launch

tasks.name: Sales deck and pitch materials
tasks.description: Create presentation deck, one-pagers, and battle cards

tasks.name: Product data sheet
tasks.description: Technical specifications, feature summary, and comparison tables

tasks.name: Case study template and first draft
tasks.description: Document beta customer success story with metrics

tasks.name: Website product landing page
tasks.description: Design and develop product page with CTAs, demo request, and specs

tasks.name: SEO and content strategy
tasks.description: Keyword research, content calendar, and blog post planning

tasks.name: Launch email campaign
tasks.description: Design and schedule email sequences for prospects and existing customers

tasks.name: Webinar/demo video production
tasks.description: Script, record, and edit product demo video or live webinar
tasks.risk_if_missed: No visual demonstration for remote prospects

tasks.name: Social media launch campaign
tasks.description: Create social posts, graphics, and paid ad campaigns

name: Sales Enablement
description: Sales readiness covering forecasting, training, CRM configuration, and demo environment setup.

tasks.description: Build bottoms-up forecast with ASP, volume, and seasonality assumptions

tasks.name: Territory and quota assignment
tasks.description: Map territories, assign quotas, and define compensation triggers

tasks.name: Product knowledge certification
tasks.description: Develop and deliver product training with assessment and certification

tasks.name: CRM product and pipeline configuration
tasks.description: Add product catalog, stages, fields, and automation rules to CRM

tasks.name: Lead scoring model
tasks.description: Define lead scoring criteria and marketing-to-sales handoff rules

tasks.name: Demo environment setup
tasks.description: Build dedicated demo instance with sample data and scenarios

tasks.name: Demo script and playbook
tasks.description: Write guided demo scripts for different personas and use cases

tasks.name: Competitive battle cards

tasks.name: Partner channel enablement kit
tasks.description: Build partner-specific materials, pricing, and onboarding guide

name: Finance & Commercial
description: Unit economics, pricing strategy, billing system setup, and commercial framework.

tasks.name: Unit economics model
tasks.description: Calculate COGS, gross margin, LTV, CAC, and payback period

tasks.name: Cost allocation framework
tasks.description: Map costs (hardware, connectivity, support) to per-unit and per-month buckets

tasks.name: Pricing strategy and tier design
tasks.description: Define pricing tiers, bundles, and discount policies

tasks.name: Competitive pricing benchmark

tasks.name: Billing system configuration
tasks.description: Configure billing platform with products, plans, and payment methods

tasks.name: Contract templates (MSA, SLA, SOW)
tasks.description: Draft standard contract templates with legal review

tasks.name: Revenue recognition policy
tasks.description: Define rev rec rules per ASC 606/IFRS 15 for hardware + subscription

tasks.name: Financial reporting dashboard
tasks.description: Build dashboards for MRR, ARR, churn, ARPU, and margin tracking

tasks.name: Partner commission structure
tasks.description: Define commission tiers, payment terms, and reporting

name: Invoicing & Revenue Assurance
description: Billing triggers, QA processes, dispute handling, and revenue assurance workflows.

tasks.name: Billing event trigger mapping
tasks.description: Map device activation, subscription start, and usage events to billing triggers

tasks.name: Automated invoice generation
tasks.description: Build automated invoice creation from billing events with correct taxation

tasks.name: Invoice QA checklist
tasks.description: Define validation rules: correct customer, amounts, tax, and terms

tasks.name: Revenue reconciliation process
tasks.description: Monthly reconciliation of invoiced vs collected vs recognized revenue

tasks.name: Dispute handling workflow
tasks.description: Define process for receiving, investigating, and resolving billing disputes

tasks.name: Credit note and adjustment process
tasks.description: Build workflow for issuing credit notes and billing adjustments

tasks.name: Dunning and collections automation
tasks.description: Configure automated payment reminders and escalation sequences

tasks.name: Revenue assurance dashboard
tasks.description: Build dashboard tracking leakage, unbilled events, and collection rates

name: Legal & Compliance
description: Contracts, privacy/data protection, GSM/telecom compliance, and warranty framework.

tasks.name: Master service agreement (MSA) template
tasks.description: Draft standard MSA covering scope, liability, indemnification, and termination

tasks.name: SLA framework and definitions
tasks.description: Define service levels, measurement methods, and penalty/credit mechanisms

tasks.name: Data processing agreement (DPA)
tasks.description: Draft GDPR/POPIA-compliant data processing terms

tasks.name: Privacy impact assessment (PIA)
tasks.description: Assess data collection, storage, and processing against privacy regulations

tasks.name: Cookie and consent management
tasks.description: Implement consent management for web properties and apps

tasks.name: GSM/telecom license assessment
tasks.description: Determine licensing requirements for cellular connectivity services

tasks.name: Type approval applications
tasks.description: Submit device type approval to national telecom regulators

tasks.name: IMEI registration and management
tasks.description: Register device IMEIs with network operators and maintain database

tasks.name: Warranty terms and conditions
tasks.description: Define warranty scope, duration, exclusions, and claim procedures

tasks.name: RMA and returns policy
tasks.description: Define return merchandise authorization process and customer communications

tasks.name: IP protection strategy
tasks.description: Assess patent, trademark, and trade secret protection needs

name: Mobile App Launch
description: End-to-end mobile application launch covering discovery, design, development, testing, app store submission, and post-launch optimization.

tasks.name: User research and interviews
tasks.description: Conduct 10-15 user interviews to validate problem and gather requirements

tasks.name: Competitive app analysis

tasks.name: Information architecture and user flows

tasks.name: Wireframes and interactive prototype
tasks.description: Create mid-fidelity wireframes and clickable prototype for testing

tasks.name: Core feature development (Sprint 1-3)

tasks.name: API integration and data sync
tasks.description: Integrate with backend APIs, implement offline support and sync

tasks.name: Push notification system
tasks.description: Implement push notifications with segmentation and deep linking

tasks.name: Unit and integration testing
tasks.description: Write test suites for business logic and API integration layers

tasks.name: Device compatibility testing
tasks.description: Test across 20+ device/OS combinations for UI and functional issues

tasks.name: App store listing and ASO
tasks.description: Prepare screenshots, descriptions, keywords, and metadata

tasks.description: Submit to Apple App Store and Google Play, handle review feedback

tasks.name: Analytics and crash reporting setup
tasks.description: Integrate analytics SDK, crash reporting, and funnel tracking

tasks.name: Post-launch monitoring and hotfix plan
tasks.description: Monitor crash rates, reviews, and prepare rapid hotfix process

name: Web App Redesign
description: Comprehensive web application redesign covering audit, UX research, wireframing, development, migration, and quality assurance.

tasks.name: Current-state UX audit
tasks.description: Heuristic evaluation of existing app identifying usability issues and pain points

tasks.name: Analytics and heatmap analysis
tasks.description: Review usage data, click heatmaps, and conversion funnels

tasks.name: User interviews and surveys
tasks.description: Conduct qualitative research with 10+ users on pain points and needs

tasks.name: Persona and journey map updates
tasks.description: Update personas and journey maps based on research findings

tasks.name: Wireframes and information architecture
tasks.description: Redesign IA and create low-fidelity wireframes for key flows

tasks.name: Design system and component library
tasks.description: Build reusable component library with tokens, patterns, and documentation

tasks.name: Frontend framework setup and scaffolding
tasks.description: Set up build tools, routing, state management, and project structure

tasks.name: Page-by-page implementation
tasks.description: Develop all pages following design system and responsive specs

tasks.name: Data migration and URL redirect plan
tasks.description: Plan content migration, URL mapping, and 301 redirect strategy

tasks.name: Cross-browser and responsive testing
tasks.description: Test on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge across desktop, tablet, and mobile

tasks.name: Accessibility audit (WCAG 2.1 AA)
tasks.description: Test and fix keyboard navigation, screen reader, and contrast issues

tasks.name: Performance optimization
tasks.description: Optimize bundle size, lazy loading, image compression, and Core Web Vitals
tasks.risk_if_missed: Slow load times and poor SEO

name: Backend Migration
description: Backend system migration covering assessment, architecture design, data migration, testing, and production cutover.

tasks.name: Current system inventory and dependency map
tasks.description: Document all services, databases, integrations, and data flows
tasks.risk_if_missed: Unknown dependencies cause outages during migration

tasks.name: Risk assessment and rollback strategy
tasks.description: Identify migration risks and define rollback procedures for each phase
tasks.dependencies: Current system inventory and dependency map
tasks.risk_if_missed: No recovery path if migration fails

tasks.name: Target architecture design
tasks.description: Design new system architecture with scalability, security, and cost targets
tasks.dependencies: Current system inventory and dependency map

tasks.name: API compatibility layer
tasks.description: Build adapter layer to maintain backward compatibility during transition

tasks.name: Database schema migration scripts
tasks.description: Write and test schema transformation and data migration scripts

tasks.name: Data validation and reconciliation tooling
tasks.description: Build tools to compare source and target data for completeness and accuracy

tasks.name: Parallel run and shadow testing
tasks.description: Run old and new systems in parallel, comparing outputs for consistency

tasks.name: Load testing on target system
tasks.description: Validate new system handles production traffic volumes

tasks.name: Cutover runbook
tasks.description: Step-by-step cutover procedure with timing, owners, and go/no-go criteria

tasks.name: DNS and traffic migration
tasks.description: Plan and execute DNS changes, load balancer updates, and traffic shifting

tasks.name: Post-migration monitoring and stabilization
tasks.description: Intensive monitoring period with rapid response for 2 weeks post-cutover

name: Security Audit & Compliance
description: Comprehensive security audit covering scoping, vulnerability assessment, penetration testing, remediation, and certification preparation.

tasks.name: Define audit scope and objectives
tasks.description: Identify systems, compliance frameworks, and assessment boundaries

tasks.name: Asset inventory and data flow mapping
tasks.description: Catalogue all assets, data stores, and data flow paths in scope

tasks.name: Automated vulnerability scanning
tasks.description: Run infrastructure and application vulnerability scanners
tasks.dependencies: Asset inventory and data flow mapping

tasks.name: Configuration and hardening review
tasks.description: Review OS, database, and cloud configurations against CIS benchmarks
tasks.dependencies: Asset inventory and data flow mapping

tasks.name: Code review and SAST analysis
tasks.description: Static application security testing and manual code review for critical paths

tasks.name: External penetration testing
tasks.description: Simulate external attacker targeting public-facing systems

tasks.name: Internal penetration testing
tasks.description: Simulate insider threat and lateral movement scenarios

tasks.name: Remediation priority matrix
tasks.description: Classify findings by severity, exploitability, and business impact

tasks.name: Critical and high finding remediation
tasks.description: Fix all critical and high severity findings with verification

tasks.name: Compliance evidence collection
tasks.description: Gather logs, configs, and attestations for compliance framework

tasks.name: Final audit report and executive summary
tasks.description: Compile findings, actions taken, and residual risk assessment

name: New Market Expansion
